flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Horry-Georgetown Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (6.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Horry-Georgetown Technical College rose 50% between 2021 and 2024 (42.9% → 64.2%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Horry-Georgetown Technical College rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 (5.2k → 6.3k).
